Header files for licensing, flash region management, and FPGA boot configuration data.

## Folders
- **[board](board/README.md)**: Header file with licensing information under the Apache License, Version 2.0.
- **[flash_region](flash_region/README.md)**: Header file for flash region management specific to S29VS flash memory.
- **[mfg](mfg/README.md)**: Defines a static array of bytes for FPGA boot configuration data.
